_note: The course's table of contents. pages/course-viewer.html reads this file to build its sidebar and to know which .mdx file to render for each chapter. Add a chapter by (1) writing course/<slug>.mdx and (2) adding one entry here — no code change needed. Order in this array is the reading order.
title: {{CHANNEL_NAME}} — Course
description: REPLACE-ME: one sentence describing what this course teaches (how to read the grammars in this repo, the history behind them, how to contribute your own).

chapters.title: REPLACE-ME: Welcome
chapters.summary: REPLACE-ME: one sentence describing this chapter.
